explanation_c_en: Otherwise = consequence, not condition.
explanation_d_en: As long is incomplete — needs as.
fallback_tip_en: Provided that = on the condition that.
fallback_tip_zh: Provided that = on the condition that.
fallback_tip_es: Provided that = on the condition that.

prompt_en: Take an umbrella ___ it rains.
prompt_zh: Take an umbrella ___ it rains.
prompt_es: Take an umbrella ___ it rains.
explanation_b_en: Correct! In case it rains = precaution.
explanation_c_en: Otherwise = consequence.
fallback_tip_en: In case = as a precaution against possible future.
fallback_tip_zh: In case = as a precaution against possible future.
fallback_tip_es: In case = as a precaution against possible future.

prompt_en: I wish I ___ more money.
prompt_zh: I wish I ___ more money.
prompt_es: I wish I ___ more money.
explanation_b_en: Correct! Had = unreal present wish.
explanation_c_en: Will have = future, wrong with wish.
explanation_d_en: Would have = past regret, different structure.
fallback_tip_en: I wish + past simple for unreal present wishes.
fallback_tip_zh: I wish + past simple for unreal present wishes.
fallback_tip_es: I wish + past simple for unreal present wishes.

prompt_en: She wishes she ___ harder for the exam yesterday.
prompt_zh: She wishes she ___ harder for the exam yesterday.
prompt_es: She wishes she ___ harder for the exam yesterday.
explanation_b_en: Studied = simple past, but yesterday needs past perfect.
explanation_c_en: Correct! Had studied = past regret.
explanation_d_en: Would study = future, wrong for past regret.
fallback_tip_en: I wish + past perfect for regrets about the past.
fallback_tip_zh: I wish + past perfect for regrets about the past.
fallback_tip_es: I wish + past perfect for regrets about the past.
